# yandex_datalens_connection (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a DataLens connection. For more information, see [the official documentation](https://yandex.cloud/ru/docs/datalens/operations/api-start).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the connection.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID for the DataLens instance. If not specified, the provider-level `organization_id` is used.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the resource.
- `description` (String) The description of the connection.
- `name` (String) The name of the connection.
- `type` (String) The connection type.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp of the resource.
- `ydb` (Attributes) YDB connection configuration. Populated when `type` is `ydb`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ydb))

<a id="nestedatt--ydb"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ydb`

Read-Only:

- `auth_type` (String) The authentication type for the connection.
- `cache_ttl_sec` (Number) The cache TTL in seconds.
- `cloud_id` (String) The cloud ID where the YDB database is located.
- `data_export_forbidden` (String) Whether data export is forbidden.
- `db_name` (String) The YDB database name (path).
- `delegation_is_set` (Boolean) Whether delegation is configured for the connection.
- `dir_path` (String) The directory path where the connection entry is stored.
- `folder_id` (String) The folder ID where the YDB database is located.
- `host` (String) The hostname of the YDB database endpoint.
- `mdb_cluster_id` (String) The Managed Databases cluster ID.
- `mdb_folder_id` (String) The folder ID for Managed Databases cluster lookup.
- `port` (Number) The port number of the YDB database endpoint.
- `raw_sql_level` (String) The level of raw SQL queries allowed.
- `service_account_id` (String) The service account ID used to access the YDB database.
- `ssl_enable` (String) Whether SSL is enabled for the connection.
- `username` (String) The username for authentication.
- `workbook_id` (String) The workbook ID where the connection is stored.
